devices: ONT; router/firewall; managed PoE switch; Mac mini or mini PC; RS-485 gateway; UPS; rack PDU
power_basis: sum actual nameplates plus PoE budget
socket_requirement: one dedicated grounded wall outlet for rack/UPS input; UPS output to rack PDU; avoid cheap daisy-chained power strips
circuit_or_safety_note: electrician to confirm circuit and grounding; ventilation required; isolate from clothes/fridge heat; second RS-485 gateway can share rack PDU if total load is low
smart_home_note: UPS only for network/control, not high-power loads

devices: RTX 3090 workstation; monitors; desk peripherals
socket_requirement: desk-side multi-socket grounded outlet group
circuit_or_safety_note: do not share with hidden extension strips; avoid blocked outlets
smart_home_note: do not put workstation on whole-rack UPS or smart plug cutoff

devices: future desktop; monitors; chargers
socket_requirement: desk-side outlet group with spare capacity
circuit_or_safety_note: final height follows desk position
smart_home_note: monitoring only if low-risk smart plug is later selected

devices: desk lamp; chargers; laptop; possible desktop or multi-computer setup
socket_requirement: desk-side grounded outlet group with spare capacity
circuit_or_safety_note: avoid being hidden by desk/cabinet/curtain; balcony moisture/sun exposure considered by electrician
smart_home_note: not UPS; monitoring only for low-risk desk loads

devices: desk lamp; computer; chargers; possible future desktop
socket_requirement: desk-side grounded outlet group with spare capacity
circuit_or_safety_note: height follows final desk and cabinet layout
smart_home_note: not UPS; monitoring only for low-risk desk loads

devices: 3090 workstation; monitors; desk lamps; chargers; possible multiple computers
socket_requirement: large desk-side grounded outlet group; consider two outlet groups if multiple computers
circuit_or_safety_note: do not hide behind fixed cabinet; avoid sharing with P2S/rack/UPS loads
smart_home_note: not UPS; do not use ordinary smart plug cutoff for workstation

devices: amplifier; player; game console; small switch; accessories
socket_requirement: AV cabinet outlet group
circuit_or_safety_note: ventilation and access inside cabinet required
smart_home_note: smart plug monitoring allowed only for low-risk AV loads

devices: projector
socket_requirement: 220V outlet coordinated with new-plan screen/mu bu location
circuit_or_safety_note: coordinate with mount; screen; AV conduit
smart_home_note: do not depend on HA for power-off during cooling unless device supports it

devices: curtain motors
socket_requirement: 220V constant power at each curtain box
circuit_or_safety_note: grounding and service access required; double curtain means two motors
smart_home_note: keep local/manual control available

devices: smart switches; relays
power_basis: module specs and lighting circuit design
socket_requirement: neutral/live/load/ground per electrician design; deep 86 boxes
circuit_or_safety_note: do not mix neutral wires across leakage-protected circuits
smart_home_note: critical lighting must remain manually usable

devices: Bambu P2S; AMS; accessories
socket_requirement: grounded outlet group near printer table
circuit_or_safety_note: separate printer/accessory outlets; dry accessible location; do not share rack PDU/UPS
smart_home_note: do not cut printer power through ordinary smart plug during print

devices: optional local exhaust or ventilation fan
socket_requirement: separate serviceable outlet or switched power
circuit_or_safety_note: PLA/PETG does not require mandatory exhaust; reserve ventilation/exhaust path for ABS/ASA/PC or heat/odor control
smart_home_note: automation may control fan only after manual fallback is available

devices: vacuum cleaner or handheld cleaner charger
socket_requirement: one normal grounded wall outlet near cleaner storage
circuit_or_safety_note: keep separate from rack UPS/PDU and P2S outlet; accessible for charging
smart_home_note: smart control not needed

devices: future high-power/service load; 3090 only if later intentionally moved here
socket_requirement: one spare grounded wall outlet; do not share rack UPS/PDU
circuit_or_safety_note: if ever used for 3090 workstation, electrician should confirm circuit capacity and ventilation
smart_home_note: not UPS; no ordinary smart plug cutoff for workstation

devices: washing machine; dryer candidate; water device candidate
socket_requirement: wet-area compliant outlet at confirmed washing-machine position
circuit_or_safety_note: moisture protection; grounding; leakage protection by electrician
smart_home_note: monitoring only; no unsafe cutoff

devices: RO; purifier; under-sink devices
socket_requirement: serviceable under-sink outlet
circuit_or_safety_note: moisture protection; accessible after cabinet installation
smart_home_note: leak alerts preferred; avoid hidden inaccessible smart plugs

devices: smart toilet; mirror cabinet; fan; sensor candidate
socket_requirement: bathroom compliant outlets at confirmed zones
circuit_or_safety_note: wet-zone, leakage protection and grounding by electrician
smart_home_note: safety devices independent of HA

devices: Gen central humidifier controller and host
socket_requirement: vendor-specified power; serviceable controller position
circuit_or_safety_note: do not use ordinary smart plug cutoff
smart_home_note: HA integration via RS-485 after vendor confirmation

devices: Hitachi HVAC converter and HVAC equipment
socket_requirement: vendor-specified HVAC power and serviceable converter power
circuit_or_safety_note: HVAC main power handled by HVAC/electrician; not by smart plug
smart_home_note: HA integration starts read-only via Modbus

devices: electric main water valve candidate
socket_requirement: power near valve plus manual operation space
circuit_or_safety_note: confirm fail-safe position and service access
smart_home_note: automation allowed only after manual and fail-safe behavior confirmed

devices: doorbell; camera candidate
socket_requirement: if non-PoE, reserve proper high/low power strategy
circuit_or_safety_note: property and privacy confirmation required
smart_home_note: PoE preferred for managed power
